q: Describe a time when you felt proud of a family member
cue_card: And explain why you felt proud of them
examiner_note: Kể về một thành tựu hoặc hành động đáng khen ngợi của người thân.

samples.band7: I felt very proud of my younger brother when he won a regional math competition last year. He had studied really hard for months, often staying up late to solve difficult problems. When his name was announced as the winner, I felt so happy because all his hard work finally paid off.
samples.band8: I remember feeling immensely proud of my younger brother when he secured first place in a prestigious regional math olympiad. He had demonstrated incredible dedication, spending his weekends practicing complex equations. Seeing him stand on the stage and receive his trophy was a deeply moving moment. It wasn't just about the award; it was about witnessing his resilience and his ability to overcome academic challenges through sheer perseverance.
samples.band9: A moment of profound pride for me was when my younger brother triumphed in a highly competitive regional mathematics competition. His preparation was characterized by a level of discipline that was truly remarkable for someone his age. When he was finally recognized as the top performer, it was a validation of his intellectual rigor and his unwavering focus. I felt proud not only of his victory but of the character he developed during the arduous process of preparation.

v.example: I was immensely proud of her achievement.
Success requires hard work and perseverance.

v.meaning: sự khắt khe về trí tuệ
v.example: The course demands great intellectual rigor.

topic: Describe a time when you felt proud of a family member
